entry.title: Bill 72 (Hawaiʻi County): On agenda 2025-10-08
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLES VI, CHAPTER 10, SECTION 6-10.3, OF THE CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO THE DIRECTOR OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT

Requires the Director of Environmental Management to have administrative experience in engineering, solid waste management, wastewater treatment, environmental policy and regulatory compliance, public administration, business, administration, or a related field; removes the requirement that the director needs to have an engineering degree or another degree in a related field.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-10-08

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 72 (Hawaiʻi County) — Council: Bill 72, Draft 2 fails - 10/8/25
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLES VI, CHAPTER 10, SECTION 6-10.3, OF THE CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO THE DIRECTOR OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT

Requires the Director of Environmental Management to have administrative experience in engineering, solid waste management, wastewater treatment, environmental policy and regulatory compliance, public administration, business, administration, or a related field; removes the requirement that the director needs to have an engineering degree or another degree in a related field.

Latest action: Council: Bill 72, Draft 2 fails - 10/8/25

View on the council site
